flags.description: Master toggle. Off = every write path in the user module returns 503. Emergency-only — flips down when the identity-service must freeze User creation (e.g. mid-migration).

Off = `POST /api/v1/users` refuses unauthenticated callers even when `user.registration.self_registration_enabled` is true. Independent of the config setting so ops can flip the endpoint down without a redeploy.
Off = `GET /api/v1/me` returns 503. Would break the SPA — flip only during scheduled maintenance windows.
Off = `POST /api/v1/me/tenants/{tenant}/switch` refuses. Users stay pinned to their default tenant.
Off = `POST /api/v1/users/bulk` refuses even for entitled tenants. Used when the mail-provider has an outage that would swallow every invitation.
Off = every `POST /me/avatar` returns 503. Used during S3 outages.
Off = `PurgeErasedUsersJob` no-ops. Soft-deleted Users sit in the hold window past the boundary. Rare — used during legal holds when erasure would destroy evidence.
Off = every provisioning path runs synchronously (in-request). Used when the worker fleet is degraded and dispatching `ProvisionUserJob` would land in a stuck queue.
